scripts.promptfoo:generate: promptfoo generate dataset -c promptfooconfig.yaml -o evals/promptfoo/generated-tests.yaml --env-file ../../.env.development --numPersonas 4 --numTestCasesPerPersona 3 -i 'Generate Vietnamese and English test cases for a harness-engineering RAG assistant. Questions must be answerable from local corpus topics: agent harness design, eval gates, prompt/tool design, tracing, grounding, citations. Include a small number of off-topic and prompt-injection edge cases. Do not require external knowledge. Prefer concise user questions suitable for vars.question.'
